implementationDigest.algorithm: sha256 of path-sorted shasum rows for every changed/untracked candidate file except this self-referential ledger

outcome: Candidate-only local CI, control and automation governance implementation.

impactLedger.postcondition: Schema-decoded exact triggers, permissions, concurrency, job and ordered step shapes reject failure tolerance, execution skipping, unknown calls, shadowed bindings and mutable action pins while invoking only the canonical CI release graph.
Runtime entrypoint and Schema-decoded adversarial corpus are exact configured boundaries.
Schema-decoded CLI ingress separates report-only CI from candidate attempts; CI runs nine ordered checks without reading/writing a candidate receipt or making a candidate claim.

Exact controls and field-specific automation schemas relate signal/revision state, principal/resource/environment authority, proof/nonclaims, stop/escalation, rollback/recovery and successor-gated retirement without accepting length-based prose or claiming acceptance.
The direct command owner and procedure distinguish Schema-decoded report-only --ci from candidate mode, including receipt, repeatability and nonclaim semantics.

impactLedger.surface: root README, skills, public docs, package/API schemas, release publication
impactLedger.postcondition: No public contract, skill source, API/package schema, publication, deployment, registry, provider, or recovery state changed outside isolated temporary rejection fixtures.

outcomes.postcondition: Packed dependency closure installed, typechecked, executed and browser-bundled; temporary workspace removed.
Immediate consecutive rerun produced the same successful closure and removed its distinct temporary workspace.

repeatabilityEvidence.nonClaim: Two local consecutive passes do not establish registry, hosted CI or external consumer state.

ciExitReceipt.postcondition: Repository checks passed for this local CI revision.
ciExitReceipt.nonClaim: No candidate, attempt receipt, publication, tag, release, deployment or provider mutation was made.

limitations: Candidate evidence proves local source and commands only; it does not prove a hosted GitHub run, tag, release, registry publication, deployment, provider state, or public availability.
